installAppDesc: Download to your device for quick access and offline mode.

intro.subtitle: Your safe space to grow! Choose mode and tools:
intro.browserWarning: For the best Voice Assistant quality, we recommend using Google Chrome.

offlineMessage: You are currently offline. Some features may be unavailable.

errors.network: Network connection failed. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page.

levelUpDesc: Another goal has been successfully achieved.

streak: {count} in a row! You are unstoppable!

testSentence: This is a test of the selected voice.
textSizeDesc: Adjust the application font size to your needs
a11yBaseDesc: Friendly font (OpenDyslexic), wider spacing, soft cream background
a11yAddonsDesc: Choose any combinations — customize the app for yourself

Kontrast.name: High contrast
Kontrast.desc: Black and white WCAG AAA colors

Linijka.name: Focus ruler
Linijka.desc: Highlights a horizontal line under the cursor

Spacing.name: Wider spacing
Spacing.desc: Increases spacing between letters and words

adaptiveDifficulty.name: Adaptive difficulty
adaptiveDifficulty.desc: Game adapts tempo to the player

noFlash.name: No flash mode
noFlash.desc: No flickering — epilepsy and motion sensitivity

audioRewards.name: Audio rewards
audioRewards.desc: Audio signals instead of purely visual

voiceAssistant.name: Voice Assistant
voiceAssistant.desc: Automatic reading of commands and answers

bionicReading.name: Bionic Reading
bionicReading.desc: Bolds beginnings of words, helps visual focus

minimalistMode.name: Minimalist view
minimalistMode.desc: Hides decorative graphics and Lottie animations

muteNotifications.name: Mute notifications
muteNotifications.desc: Disables success/error speech and game sounds

cognitiveBreaks.name: Break reminders
cognitiveBreaks.desc: App suggests rest after a series of errors

Linijka.name: Focus ruler
Linijka.desc: Highlights a horizontal line under the cursor

Spacing.name: Wider spacing
Spacing.desc: Increases spacing between letters and words

gamificationDesc: Customize the reward system to your needs
themeShopDesc: Spend coins on new visual themes
earnCoinHint: You earn 1 coin for every correct answer
gardenEmpty: Your own ecosystem. It will grow with your every progress.
srVisitor: A friendly visitor joined you thanks to your regular practice.
srTrophies: Thanks to perseverance, {count} unique objects appeared in the garden.
errorAnalysisSub: Number of mistakes on specific days
exportDesc: Download NASA-TLX and UEQ survey results

feedback.title: A moment of reflection
feedback.desc: How do you rate today's session? Your feedback helps us adapt the app to you.

nasa.mentalDesc: How much mental activity was required?
nasa.physicalDesc: How much physical activity was required?
nasa.temporalDesc: How much time pressure did you feel?
nasa.performanceDesc: How successful do you think you were?
nasa.effortDesc: How hard did you have to work to achieve your level of performance?
nasa.frustrationDesc: How insecure, discouraged, irritated, or stressed were you?

breakDesc: We noticed you are working hard. Rest in the garden to regenerate and prevent fatigue.
breakTip: Tip: Look away from the screen into the distance (preferably at something green) for at least 20 seconds.
trackAndMatch: Follow the highlight and indicate the direction
tapToBuild: Select words in the correct order
tapBoxesInstruction: Tap the boxes while pronouncing each single sound.
lookAndListen: Look at the word and listen to its pronunciation.
takeYourTime: Take your time. Feel the shape of sounds in your mouth before writing.
typeBlendedWord: Type the word these sounds form.
blendSounds: I am ready to blend sounds
rtSummarizeDesc: What was the main idea of this text?
rtQuestionDesc: Ask a question about something unclear or interesting in the text.
rtClarifyDesc: Identify unclear words and explain them in your own words.
rtPredictDesc: What do you think will happen next?
thesisInfo:
Master's Thesis
Accessible Gamification and Voice Integration
in a PWA supporting speech therapy exercises
for individuals with dyslexia
pwaDescription: New content is available. Update the app to get the latest changes offline.
affirmations: Your garden is growing beautifully thanks to your work today.
Every step is progress. Wonderful effort!
A calm pace is the best way to learn.
You are making steady progress. Keep going at your own pace.
Thank you for being here today. Your commitment matters.

dailyTaskComplete.title: Wonderful effort!
dailyTaskComplete.desc: You have completed today's practice. Your consistency builds a strong foundation.
dailyTaskComplete.chooseReward: Choose a reward that will grow in the garden

rose.name: Rose Bush
rose.desc: A beautiful reward for your focus.

reflection.title: A moment of reflection
reflection.desc: There are no grades here. How confident did you feel during this exercise?

sus.q01: I think that I would like to use this system frequently.
sus.q02: I found the system unnecessarily complex.
sus.q03: I thought the system was easy to use.
sus.q04: I think that I would need the support of a technical person to be able to use this system.
sus.q05: I found the various functions in this system were well integrated.
sus.q06: I thought there was too much inconsistency in this system.
sus.q07: I would imagine that most people would learn to use this system very quickly.
sus.q08: I found the system very cumbersome to use.
sus.q09: I felt very confident using the system.
sus.q10: I needed to learn a lot of things before I could get going with this system.

realWorldImpact.title: Your Impact
realWorldImpact.desc: Your progress supports real-world goals. Every 10 points contributes to one virtually planted tree.
realWorldImpact.newTreeMsg: Amazing! Your consistent learning helped us virtually plant another tree.
